text: Register and submit the OpenAI Build Week entry by 21 July
description: Human submission checklist: join the Devpost hackathon; choose Developer Tools; provide project description, public or judge-shared repository, working demo/test access, public YouTube video, and /feedback Codex Session ID. Deadline is 21 July 2026 at 17:00 PDT (22 July 02:00 CEST). Enter as an eligible German individual or authorized team representative.

reflections.context: The authenticated user is already registered; a Devpost project draft exists. Final submission is blocked only by the required public YouTube demo and explicit final confirmation.
reflections.outcome: Prepared exact live-schema answers for all seven custom submission fields in submission-payload.md, including Individual, Germany, Developer Tools, public repository, testing instructions, feedback session ID, and platform/install instructions. Reframed the 2:35 demo around the playful recursive experiment and jury-provided outcome.
reflections.effectiveness: Once the YouTube URL arrives, submission becomes a single connector call with no remaining copy decisions.
reflections.lesson: Treat the application workflow as executable product evidence, while preserving final submission as an explicit human-authorized boundary.

status.comment: Requires Felix's Devpost/OpenAI accounts and final submission authorization.
